releaseNotes: v0.24.12 — Every export action now offers a clear Save-to-phone option in addition to Share. Save uses the Android Save File dialog so files land in Downloads (or anywhere you pick) and can be opened from your file manager. The DSCSA audit pack and full backup are now zipped into a single .zip so save/share is one attachment instead of six. Fixes Alex's report that the audit-pack share sheet had no obvious download path.
